name: DEMO 20 - HLD to LLD and Spec Fanout

parameters.content:
## HLD fan-out demo

One HLD creates multiple LLD work items.

Each LLD child workflow then creates multiple Spec work items.

HLD 1
→ LLD N
→ Spec M per LLD

nodes.name: Run one LLD child per item

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { project_key: 'OPS-123', hld_issue: 'HLD-001', lld_count: 3, spec_count: items.length, fanout_status: 'all_lld_and_specs_completed', completed_spec_issues: items.map(item => item.json.spec_issue) } }];

main.node: Run one LLD child per item
